runTitle: Vercel targeted QA - AI workspace dashboard return worker fallback resolved

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed before production targeted recheck; billed usage remains 0.0000 USD.

completedImprovements.title: Dashboard logs Web Worker fallback error after returning from fullscreen AI workspace
completedImprovements.note: After deploying v8.11.26, the production path `/dashboard/ai-assistant -> /dashboard` completed with console error count 0. Only preload warnings remained, and the previous `Worker terminated` -> `Worker 계산 실패, Fallback 사용` error no longer reproduced.

notes: Production `/api/version` matched v8.11.26 before the targeted recheck was recorded.
Playwright MCP showed console errors 0 while returning from AI workspace to dashboard.
Residual browser noise was limited to CSS preload warnings, not application runtime errors.
